data.title: Tether Plans to Launch AI Platform as Alternative to OpenAI
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino has disclosed in a recent interview that while the company's U.S. stablecoin initiative is still in its early and uncertain stages, Tether is actively working on diversifying into artificial intelligence. The company plans to launch its own AI platform in June or September, which will serve as a peer-to-peer alternative to models like OpenAI. This platform will enable users to control their data and perform all reasoning and complex AI logic on their own devices, ranging from $30 smartphones to iPhones, Android phones, and any laptop. Additionally, it will allow direct connections to other devices for enhanced functionality, eliminating the need to share data with ChatGPT.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: It is possible to reach an agreement with allies, and 70 negotiations are currently scheduled
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said that although there is some uncertainty, businesses told me that the economy is very solid. If other countries do not take retaliatory measures, the tariff level will be the upper limit. A large number of countries hope to come to Washington for negotiations, and 70 negotiations are currently scheduled. In the end, we may reach an agreement with our allies. (Jinshi)

data.title: Traders see more than a 60% chance the Fed will start cutting rates in May
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Traders believe that the probability of the Federal Reserve starting to cut interest rates in May is more than 60%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Babylon: Plans to launch the second phase on April 10 and release the L1 blockchain Babylon Genesis
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin staking protocol Babylon announced that the Babylon Genesis chain is scheduled to be publicly released at 18:00 Beijing time on April 10, 2025, after a short setup period (used to activate key components such as validator nodes, finality providers, supervisors, bridges, etc.). This arrangement is the second phase of Babylon's launch of the Bitcoin staking protocol. When the second phase is launched, eligible airdrop recipients will receive BABY tokens in their registered BABY wallets without claiming them. BABY token transfers and staking will be enabled on the first day.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson: Now it's time for ordinary people to take the lead, not Wall Street alone
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant said it is now the turn of ordinary people to take the stage, not Wall Street. Bessant also said that he would focus on more targeted supervision, noting that supervision should be fair and evenly applied across entities. "The U.S. Treasury intends to promote changes in regulatory culture by improving review procedures, strengthening supervision of examiners' compliance with these procedures, and more realistic procedures for appealing regulatory results," Bessant said. "Perhaps the most important step is to define rules for "unsafe and unsound" using more objective measures based on financial risks." He said he would pay special attention to more targeted supervision of community banks, which have been struggling with "undue compliance burdens" that require heavy investments in technology. "Wall Street has been richer than ever in the past four decades. It can continue to grow and perform well." But in the next four years, it will be the turn of 'Main Street' to drive investment. (Jinshi)

data.title: Major Mining Companies Report 17.1% Increase in March Bitcoin Production
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Farside Investors reveals that all major publicly listed mining companies have reported their March mining activities. Collectively, these companies mined a total of 3,648 Bitcoins, marking a 17.1% increase compared to the previous month.

data.title: Data: Bitget Launchpool, a mainstream CEX project, achieved positive growth within 30 days of launch
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoRank’s latest data shows that since November 2024, the comparison of mainstream CEX Launchpool projects is as follows:
Binance: A total of 5 Launchpool projects were launched, with an average FDV (first 7 days) of US$2.13 billion, an average price change of -15% within 7 days, and a drop of -41% within 30 days.
Bitget: A total of 12 projects were launched, with an average FDV of US$756 million, an average price change of -16% within 7 days, but an average increase of 12% within 30 days.
OKX: Only 1 project was launched, with an average FDV of US$571 million, a drop of -49% within 7 days, and a drop of -69% within 30 days.
Bybit: A total of 13 projects were launched, with an average FDV of US$449 million, an average drop of -5% within 7 days, and a drop of -21% within 30 days.
According to the data, Bitget is the only exchange platform that achieved positive returns within 30 days.

data.title: Data: In March, listed mining companies mined a total of 3,648 BTC, a month-on-month increase of 17.1%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Farside Investors data showed that all major listed mining companies have reported on their mining situation in March, with a total of 3,648 bitcoins mined.
